name: ai-orchestrator
description: Production-grade multi-provider AI orchestration platform with Browser Intelligence OS

commands.setup: source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -e '.[dev]' && python -m playwright install firefox 2>&1 | tail -3

chat.description: Send prompt to all providers via chat endpoint (mock mode)
chat.command: source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import asyncio, httpx; import json; async def main(): async with httpx.AsyncClient() as c: r = await c.post('http://localhost:8765/chat', json={'prompt': 'What is 2+2? Reply in ONE word.', 'providers': ['chatgpt_ui', 'deepseek_ui', 'qwen_ui', 'kimi_ui', 'z_ai_ui', 'xiaomimimo_ui', 'minimax_ui', 'local_llm'], 'parallel': True, 'mock_mode': True}); print(json.dumps(r.json(), indent=2)); asyncio.run(main())"

zai-real.description: Test Z.AI in real mode (browser automation) via OpenAI-compatible endpoint
zai-real.command: source .venv/bin/activate && curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8765/v1/chat/completions' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"z_ai_ui","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Say exactly: The answer is 42."}],"stream":false}' | python -m json.tool

minimax-real.description: Test MiniMax in real mode (browser automation) via OpenAI-compatible endpoint
minimax-real.command: source .venv/bin/activate && curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8765/v1/chat/completions' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"minimax_ui","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Say exactly: The answer is 42."}],"stream":false}' | python -m json.tool

zai-stream.description: Test Z.AI in real mode with streaming via OpenAI-compatible endpoint
zai-stream.command: source .venv/bin/activate && curl -s -N -X POST 'http://localhost:8765/v1/chat/completions' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"z_ai_ui","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Say exactly: The answer is 42."}],"stream":true}' 2>&1 | head -20

all-real.description: Test all providers in real mode (parallel, 2-min timeout)
